# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on: 
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Cache Node.js modules
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: node_modules
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '16'

    - name: Install Node.js dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Cache Python packages
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/pip
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

    - name: Install Python dependencies
      run: pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Cache Configuration Files
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: .config/cache
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ hashFiles('*.env', 'config/*.yml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-config-

    - name: Run build
      run: npm run build

    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test
